entities.name: WEATHER AND CLIMATE INFORMATION SERVICES
entities.description: Services providing weather and climate data to support agricultural adaptation and decision-making

entities.name: SENEGAL
entities.description: A country in West Africa where the study on WCIS uptake was conducted

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: The continent where drylands are located and where WCIS implementation is discussed

entities.name: AGRICULTURE
entities.description: The sector for which WCIS is an essential adaptation tool

entities.name: RAINY SEASONS
entities.description: The period during which data were collected to understand WCIS utility and reliability

entities.name: DESCRIPTIVE STATISTICS
entities.description: Statistical method used to analyze the collected data on WCIS users

entities.name: BINARY LOGISTIC REGRESSION
entities.description: Statistical method used to understand the socio-economic triggers in the uptake of WCIS

entities.name: RAINFALL FORECAST
entities.description: The most preferred type of WCIS among the respondents

entities.name: EXTREME WIND FORECAST
entities.description: A preferred type of WCIS among the respondents

entities.name: SOWING DATE
entities.description: A decision made by farmers based on disseminated WCIS at the beginning of the rainy season

entities.name: CROP VARIETIES
entities.description: A decision made by farmers based on disseminated WCIS at the beginning of the rainy season

entities.name: FERTILIZER APPLICATION DATES
entities.description: A decision made by farmers based on WCIS in the middle of the growing season

entities.name: SOCIO-ECONOMIC TRIGGERS
entities.description: Factors such as age, education, and training that affect the uptake of WCIS

entities.name: AGE
entities.description: A socio-economic factor that has a significant effect on WCIS-based decision-making

entities.name: LEVEL OF EDUCATION
entities.description: A socio-economic factor that has a significant effect on WCIS-based decision-making

entities.name: WCIS TRAINING
entities.description: Being trained on WCIS use, which significantly affects decision-making

entities.name: FARMERS' ORGANIZATIONS MEMBERSHIP
entities.description: Membership in farmers' organizations that affects WCIS-based decision-making

entities.name: RADIO OWNERSHIP
entities.description: Owning a radio, which has a significant effect on WCIS-based decision-making
